BRIXS¶

BRIXS is a python package for analysis of RIXS spectra.

  • Installation
  • CCD images and spectrum manipulation
  • Generate dummy spectra and fake CCD images for testing

Support modules¶

BRIXS brings a set of python modules that are considered “everyday use”. They not only add functionality to the main modules, but also can be used directly by the user.

  • Array manipulation module
  • File manipulation module
  • Matplotlib figure manipulation module
  • Interaction module
  • Model functions module

Tutorials and Examples¶

  • Example 1
  • Example 2
